properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 171/23
 1.ISPS SECURITY INFOMATION NORWEGIAN PORTS
 FROM 221100 UTC DEC 23 MARITIME SECURITY LEVEL IS SETT FROM LEVEL 2 TO LEVEL 1 IN FOLLOWING PORTS:
 NOKAS-0059. KAARSTOE GAS PROSSING PLANT

 FOLLOWING NORWEGIAN PORT FACILLITIES ARE STILL AT ISPS SECURITY LEVEL 2
 NOMLK-0001. HAMMERFEST LNG MELKOEYA
 NOAVE-0001. NORSEA VESTBASE AVEROEY
 NOSLA-0002. NORSEA TANANGER
 NOSSJ-0007. HELGELAND BASE
 NOTAE-0002. CONOCO PHILLIPS BASE TANANGER
 NOHAU-0003. KILLINGOEY SUBSEA AND OFFSHOREBASE

 SHIPS CALLING AT THESE FACILLITIES SHALL RESPOND WITHOUT DELAY TO THIS CHANGE IN SCURITY LEVEL.
 2.CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 154/23
